title: pilosella brachiata subsp. pedunculata
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. pedunculata, also known as mouse-ear hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Pilosella brachiata plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilosella brachiata subsp. pedunculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and fever. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
